response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video content; identified Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru, and Omaru Polka. 
2. Identified song title "咲き誇れアイドル" from on-screen text. 
3. Performed web search for lyrics, but none were found due to the song likely being new. 
4. Transcribed lyrics directly from the on-screen Japanese text. 
5. Mapped the transcription to two chronological scenes based on the flow of the performance.
response.global_summary: The video captures a full vocal performance of the song "咲き誇れアイドル" by Sakura Miko, accompanied by Oozora Subaru and Omaru Polka as dancers, during "さくらみこ生誕祭2026". The entire video features this song performance. Lyrics are provided based on on-screen transcription.

scenes.description: The video begins with the performance of "咲き誇れアイドル". Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru, and Omaru Polka perform choreography on a stage with a large digital screen. Lyrics appear on-screen throughout.
scenes.performer_in_video: Sakura Miko, Oozora Subaru, Omaru Polka
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: 天才的… 人生企画… 問題集… 対抗美学… 君はなにをしてんのかな… 話がしたい… 風に乗って青春が… この想いを運んだ… 僕ら全力も超えたいんだ… 立ちすくむどうだって… 引き連れていこうぜ… この上のない塔は… 少しステイたいよ… 今しかできないことがある… 今しかできない恋がある… 今しかできないから 僕らに託された時間が惜しい… 今しか見られない君の笑顔も… 君の涙も… 君の全てを… 大人になっていく… 有限だから最高だ… 恥ずかしいか青春は… 馬鹿らしくか真剣は… 僕ら全力でやってんだ… 振りかざせ存在を… 掻き乱せ心臓を… 胸に刻めば… 続いていくのだろう… 守り抜いた青春が… 何よりも贅沢だ… きっといつか焦がれ思い返す… 名前のない関係を… 捨てきれない感情を… 何気ない今日も… 忘れないでね… この上のない今日を… 忘れないでね…
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: [Transliterated on-screen lyrics] Geniuses... Life-changing... Problems... Aesthetic resistance... What are you doing?... I want to talk... Ride the wind, youth... Carrying these thoughts... Surpassing our best... I want to surpass it... Standing still... Together... I'll take you... This never-ending tower... I want to keep on... I have things only I can do now... I have love only I can do now... Because only I can do it, the time entrusted to us is precious... The smiles I can see now... Your tears... Everything... Growing up... Limited, so it's the best... Embarrassing youth... Stupidly serious... We are doing our best... Flaunt our existence... Shake up our hearts... Carve it into our chests... It will continue... Protective youth... More than anything, it's a luxury... Someday, I'll look back at this... Relationship with no name... Emotions I can't throw away... Today without name... Don't forget... The day I can't forget...

scenes.description: The song continues with a focus on Sakura Miko. Lyrics appear on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: アイ！アイドルだから、挑み続けるんだ 君と夢見るんだ 不器用でもいいか 咲き誇るよ… 挑み続けるんだ 君と夢見るんだ 不器用でもいいか 咲き誇れ… 空想だけで終わらせない 私らしい桜色ね… 咲き誇れアイドル… 挑み続けるんだ 君と夢見るんだ 不器用でもいいか 咲き誇れ… 空想だけで終わらせない 私らしい桜色ね… 磨いたスキル 実力発揮 楽しめる日も増えてきたんだ… アイドルとして生きてる… 君のおかげ… アホ毛はキュート 勝ち確ルート… そんな私についてきてよね！… ドジなとこも許されて… 最強じゃん！… 痛いの痛いのグッと飲み込んで… 笑顔で笑顔増やしたいな… 花前線が君の町に… 春を届けるように… アイ！アイドルだけは 譲りたくないんだ 君に魅せたいんだ 意気越え挑むのよ… 駆け抜けろ最高景色見せたる… 信じていいよ桜を… さあ皆で咲かそう… 満開のピンクで世界染めて… ああこの涙はね…
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: [Transliterated on-screen lyrics] Idol! Because I'm an idol, I'll keep challenging myself. I dream with you. Clumsy but... Blooming... I will keep challenging myself. I dream with you. Clumsy but... Blooming... Don't end it with just expectation. I'll show you my best self. Believe in me... Idol! Because I'm an idol, I'll keep challenging myself. I dream with you. Clumsy but... Blooming... My own Sakura color... Idol! Because I'm an idol, I'll keep challenging myself. I dream with you. I'll show you... Believe in me... Let's all bloom! Dye the world in pink! Ah, these tears...
